params.name: Aladdin's Lamp
params.source:
* Grandmaster Scrolls (1%), Lottery Machine (0.12%), Relic Forge (100 Relic RF), Wishing (0.08%)
* Altar Value Pack II ($49.99)
params.description: On Apr 14, 617 AD, Aladdin from the East found a magic lamp. On this day, Aladdin was trapped in a cave. He took out the magic lamp and rubbed it in desperation and summoned a genie. The genie guided him home. In the lamp he stole from the cave, an all-powerful genie awaits his master's call at any time. By the genie's help, Aladdin became rich and powerful enough to marry the princess. Later, the genie built a palace for Aladdin, which is more magnificent than the emperor's palace.
